requirement: UI dashboard page view button should go direct to work detail.

tasks.description: Set up project scaffolding with routing infrastructure. Initialize a React/Next.js project with a router (React Router or Next.js App Router). Define routes for the dashboard (/dashboard) and work detail (/work/:id). Create shared types/interfaces for WorkItem (id, title, status, etc.).

Build the dashboard page component that displays a list/grid of work items. Include a 'View' button on each work item row/card. The View button should trigger navigation to /work/:id using the router's navigation function (e.g., navigate() or Link).

Build the work detail page that displays full details of a selected work item. Read the work item id from the URL route parameter, fetch or receive the work item data, and render its details (title, description, status, assigned user, etc.).

Write integration tests verifying the full navigation flow: dashboard renders work items, clicking View navigates to the correct work detail page, and the detail page shows the right data. Also test edge cases (invalid id, empty work list).

feature_slices.description: Set up project scaffolding with routing infrastructure. Initialize a React/Next.js project with a router (React Router or Next.js App Router). Define routes for the dashboard (/dashboard) and work detail (/work/:id). Create shared types/interfaces for WorkItem (id, title, status, etc.).
acceptance: WorkItem type defined with id, title, and core fields

feature_slices.description: Build the dashboard page component that displays a list/grid of work items. Include a 'View' button on each work item row/card. The View button should trigger navigation to /work/:id using the router's navigation function (e.g., navigate() or Link).
acceptance: Dashboard page renders a list of work items
Each work item has a visible 'View' button
Clicking 'View' navigates directly to /work/:id with the correct work item id
No intermediate modal or confirmation step

feature_slices.description: Build the work detail page that displays full details of a selected work item. Read the work item id from the URL route parameter, fetch or receive the work item data, and render its details (title, description, status, assigned user, etc.).
acceptance: Work detail page renders when navigating to /work/:id
Page displays full work item details from the matched id
Handles missing/invalid id gracefully (404 or empty state)
Back or navigation to dashboard works correctly

feature_slices.description: Write integration tests verifying the full navigation flow: dashboard renders work items, clicking View navigates to the correct work detail page, and the detail page shows the right data. Also test edge cases (invalid id, empty work list).
acceptance: Test: Dashboard renders and View button is clickable
Test: Clicking View navigates to /work/:id with correct id
Test: Work detail page displays correct data for the id
Test: Invalid id shows appropriate fallback/404
